publishedAbstract: This article sheds light on how a seemingly harmless edit could lead to a cluster outage. An incident occurred in one of the labs where the priority of the Privileged SCC was raised from its default value of 0 to 1000 causing a domino effect of failures across the OCP cluster. The ODF operator went through an automatic upgrade and inherited the new privileged SCC.
publishedTitle: Why editing reserved OpenShift SCCs could severely impact OCP functionality
